title: Lillian Zhang
content:
People.ContactEmail lzhang@mtiplus.ca
Lillian Zhang is a Paraprofessional with our Immigration Law Division, based in Toronto. She has worked in the Canadian Immigration field for 10 years. Lillian has extensive experience in preparation and filing all temporary residence (especially employment-based work permit) applications. She has multi-tasking skills to coordinate a high volume of cases and ability to communicate effectively with a wide range of clients. Lillian also has expertise in permanent residence applications, including sponsorship and H&C.
Lillian is a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant in good standing. She is fluent in English and Mandarin.
